calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar May-04-2007 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 8:45am
Elizabeth Handley calls the court to request a continuance for both she and her son Brian Handley. (They involved in three related cases: 028347, 028348 & 028352) She claimed both she and her son were extremely ill with the flu and could not attend today's hearing. The clerk conferred with Judge Pro Tem David Fleisig and it was decided the Court would call the case and discuss it with the attorney for Rhine-Romero Family Trust, Steven Rosenthal. Ms. Handley was told the Judge would decide whether the case would be continued or not, after calling all three matters. The clerk informed Ms. Handley, that she would call her to notify her whether Judge Fleisig continued the matter or not.
10:00am (028347)
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Mr. Steven Rosenthal appears for Rhine-Romero Family Trust, Appellant. There is no appearance by respondent, Elizabeth Handley.
10:15am
The Court denies Ms. Handley's motions to continue, finding no good cause.
Mr. Rosenthal presents his related cases.
10:25am
Matter is submitted, no new evidence identified or retained
